items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a Head of People Operations to lead our People function and build the culture, programs, and infrastructure that support our growing team. Reporting to the CEO, you will own everything from talent acquisition and employee experience to compensation, L&D, and organizational design.

This is a strategic leadership role for someone who has built People teams at scaling technology companies and understands how to create systems that attract, develop, and retain top talent. You will be a trusted advisor to the executive team on all people-related matters.

Responsibilities

  • Define and execute the People strategy aligned with company goals and values
  • Lead and grow a team spanning recruiting, HR operations, and learning and development
  • Design compensation and benefits programs that are competitive and equitable
  • Build performance management, career development, and succession planning frameworks
  • Champion diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging initiatives
  • Ensure compliance with employment laws across all operating jurisdictions

Requirements

  • 10+ years of progressive HR/People experience, with 4+ years in a leadership role
  • Experience building People functions at companies scaling from 100 to 500+ employees
  • Deep knowledge of compensation benchmarking, benefits design, and total rewards
  • Experience with distributed and international teams
  • Strong business acumen and ability to tie People initiatives to business outcomes

Nice to Have

  • SPHR, SHRM-SCP, or equivalent certification
  • Experience at venture-backed technology companies
  • Background in organizational psychology or industrial-organizational research
